postings.title: Rajat Khanda
postings.evidence: AI ML Software Engineering Lead at Supermicro. Leading AI/ML research and development with a focus on NLP, LLMs, RAGs and Reinforcement Learning.

postings.title: Xin Yang
postings.evidence: Senior Software Engineer in applied AI at Supermicro. Working on generative AI (RAG) with Langgraph/Llamaindex/Deepseek on NVIDIA H100 GPUS.

postings.title: Wyatt Leung
postings.evidence: Director of Software Engineering & Product Management at Supermicro. Hired by CEO to define strategy & roadmap for Supermicro's AI software business. Manage GenAI PM and software engineering teams.

postings.title: Nancy Yang
postings.evidence: Software Engineer at Supermicro. Enhancing the Infrastructure for AI Innovation. Profile lists AI/ML but role duties unclear from snippet.
